evals.prompt: Add conversation memory to my daily standup app at apps/daily-standup/. The AI should remember my previous standups so it can reference patterns over time — e.g. if I keep mentioning the same blocker, it should notice. Show a history of past AI responses and add a 'Clear history' button.
evals.expected_output: src/memory.js created with loadHistory/clearHistory helpers; webai.js updated with ...rest spread; App.jsx loads history on mount, shows past turns, passes appId to streamCompletion, has a clear history button; app rebuilds.

assertions.name: memory_js_created
assertions.description: src/memory.js exists with loadHistory and clearHistory

assertions.name: webai_js_rest_spread
assertions.description: webai.js streamCompletion spreads ...rest so appId is not dropped

assertions.name: load_history_on_mount
assertions.description: App.jsx calls loadHistory (or loadAppChatHistory) on mount

assertions.name: clear_button_present
assertions.description: App.jsx has a clear history button or action
